title: Gabriel’s Keg
bodyText:
Wondrous item (rare, attunement) — polished oak, gear emblem of Gond. *"Learn where you come from, uncover what you hold dear, and share all the joy you can."* Endless basic ale; add ingredients to brew magic (1/short rest, serves 4, 10 min to brew, 1 action to drink).

# Ingredient effects
- **Calmcap Mushroom** (1gp): vividly relive your last beautiful/peaceful memory.
- **Charred Mossroot** (3gp): heal 4d4.
- **Ruby Crystals** (5gp): +2 attack & damage, 1 hr.
- **Giant Bat Wing** (13gp): fly 30ft, 1 hr *(used in S13!)*.
- **Mithril Flakes** (50gp): +2 AC & saves, magic attacks, 1d6 force aura, one 30-ft shockwave (DC15 STR, 4d10 force, prone). **Death = dissolve into liquid mithril** (Wish to resurrect). Overuse (>1/week): creeping mithril petrification (DC14 CON).
